icp_summary.description: 2-3 sentence narrative description of the ideal customer, usable in a sales deck or brief

tier_1.description: Best-fit accounts — all firmographic criteria met plus at least one behavioral trigger

criteria.description: Key-value pairs of criteria and their required values/ranges for Tier 1

description.description: Short description of what qualifies an account as Tier 1

tier_2.description: Strong-fit accounts — firmographic criteria met but no active behavioral trigger

criteria.description: Key-value pairs of criteria for Tier 2

description.description: Short description of what qualifies an account as Tier 2

tier_3.description: Marginal-fit accounts — partial firmographic match or trigger without full firmographic fit

criteria.description: Key-value pairs of criteria for Tier 3

description.description: Short description of what qualifies an account as Tier 3

negative_icp.description: Explicit exclusion criteria — companies that match these should be removed from consideration

firmographic_filters.description: Key-value object of directly filterable firmographic criteria (suitable for use in a lead list builder or CRM filter)

behavioral_triggers.description: Buying signals and intent triggers that indicate near-term purchase readiness
